title: Build operations data model and API
definition_of_done: Operations items, notes, links, and content blocks CRUD are live.
codex_prompt: Implement operations_items, operations_item_notes, operations_item_links, and operations_item_content_blocks models plus CRUD APIs under /api/admin/operations.

title: Build Operations home board and status workflow
definition_of_done: Kanban board with prioritise/actioned/complete and P0/P1/P2 filtering is working.
codex_prompt: Create /admin/operations board UI with status lanes, filters, and editable task cards.

title: Enable Start with Codex modal on every task
definition_of_done: Every task card has Start with Codex modal with prefilled prompt and copy action.
codex_prompt: Add Start with Codex button to task cards that opens modal with codex_prompt and updates status from prioritise to actioned.

title: North-star KPI tile and trend
definition_of_done: North-star metric is visible with daily trend line.
codex_prompt: Build /admin/operations/north-star-kpis with north-star tile and daily trend query.

title: Implement event taxonomy validation
definition_of_done: Core funnel events validate required schema before analytics ingest.
codex_prompt: Implement event schema validators for visit, signup, onboarding_completed, first_insight_generated, first_action_completed, week2_returned, converted_paid.

title: Build conversion funnel and drop-off dashboard
definition_of_done: Visit->paid funnel and drop-off percentages refresh daily.
codex_prompt: Create /admin/operations/funnel-control with conversion table, drop-off metrics, and trend comparisons.

title: Create AI flow registry
definition_of_done: All production AI flows are recorded with contracts and fallback behavior.
codex_prompt: Build AI flow registry CRUD with fields for flow_name, output_contract, latency_sla, fallback_behavior, and owner.

title: Add prompt versioning and rollback
definition_of_done: Each flow references active prompt version and supports rollback.
codex_prompt: Implement prompt version history model and rollback actions in AI Quality Control.

title: Launch weekly next-best-action dashboard
definition_of_done: Weekly action plans appear in retention dashboard for active users.
codex_prompt: Create retention engine page with weekly action plan feed and completion tracking.

title: Pricing plan matrix editor
definition_of_done: Admin can edit Starter/Pro/Reseller/White-label features and limits.
codex_prompt: Build pricing-packaging page with editable plan matrix and entitlement mapping.

title: GTM pipeline board
definition_of_done: Lead stages and conversion counts are visible and editable.
codex_prompt: Implement GTM pipeline kanban with stages new/qualified/demo/pilot/won/lost and conversion stats.

title: AI cost telemetry and threshold alerts
definition_of_done: Cost per active user/outcome visible with threshold alerting.
codex_prompt: Build reliability-cost dashboard with AI cost telemetry by model/flow/tenant and alert thresholds.

title: Compliance retention/deletion controls
definition_of_done: Policy records and delete-request tracking are implemented.
codex_prompt: Create compliance-trust module for data retention policies, deletion requests, and audit log views.

title: Experiment lifecycle tracker
definition_of_done: Experiments can move through planned/running/analyzing/adopted/killed with outcomes.
codex_prompt: Implement experiment-lab with hypothesis template, lifecycle states, and outcome reporting.

title: Weekly rhythm workflow
definition_of_done: Monday/Wednesday/Friday operations checklist and decision log are active.
codex_prompt: Build weekly-rhythm page with recurring review templates and completion tracking.
